arts.ttl: Tottenham given five options to replace Ange Postecoglou as huge 'quit' claim made
arts.sum: Despite the fact that Ipswich find themselves in a tricky position, languishing in 19th place with only three wins, McKenna's deep roots at Tottenham - from his seven years at Spurs' academy to his comeback as an Under-18s coach in 2015 - suggest he knows the North London club like few others do. The 59-year-old, who took the helm at Spurs in June 2023, has had a less than stellar season with his squad currently sitting uncomfortably in 14th place in the Premier League after 13 defeats.

arts.ttl: 'He told me': Yang Min-hyeok reveals the message Heung-min Son gave him before leaving Tottenham on loan
arts.sum: Yang Min-hyeok has been speaking about the advice Heung-min Son gave him before he headed out on loan to Queens Park Rangers. Spurs’ sporting director...

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Tottenham go head to head for €52m Serie A sensation
arts.sum: Kean has exploded this season in Serie A since joining Fiorentina last summer from Juventus for a fee of €13 million plus €5m in bonuses. Arsenal and Tottenham are considering moving for Fiorentina striker Moise Kean this summer, according to Nicolo Schira.

Aston Villa come into Sunday's game against Tottenham the fresher of the two teams and will look to bounce back from their disappointing 2-0 loss at rivals Wolves last week. Villa are unbeaten in 10 a...

arts.ttl: 'All the time': Morgan Rogers says he is very close friends with £45m Tottenham star who he always speaks to
Jamie Donley Tottenham development plan revealed after Leyton Orient FA Cup magic vs Man City
arts.sum: "Spurs have been great with us, loaned us one of their best young players and we think we’ve developed him really well over the last six months. Jamie Donley is now known to most in football after what he did in Leyton Orient's FA Cup clash against Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Tottenham fans call for Ange Postecoglou to make major selection decision and bench £22m attacker vs Aston Villa
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur fans have called for Ange Postecoglou to drop one of their key attackers against Aston Villa following his underwhelming display at Liverpool. Tottenham...

arts.ttl: Undeterred Aston Villa set to 'renew' transfer interest in Villarreal duo
arts.sum: Aston Villa are set to renew their interest in Villarreal duo Juan Foyth and Alex Baena when the summer transfer window opens, it has been claimed. It says Baena has been a long-term target for Aston Villa, and Villarreal are expected to be open to offers during the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Tottenham FA Cup fourth round predicted as trophy hunt continues
arts.sum: After being knocked out of the Carabao Cup midweek, Tottenham will be looking to bounce back with a win against Aston Villa in the FA Cup fourth round later today. A 3-0 win against Tamworth booked Spurs' place in the FA Cup fourth round, with Aston Villa beating West Ham United 2-1 to set up the clash with Postecoglou's side.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Tottenham Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: There is an all-Premier League FA Cup tie at Villa Park this evening as Aston Villa host Tottenham. Ahead of the clash, we’ve made a prediction for the game, provided our predicted line-ups for...
